bird.name: Northern black korhaan
bird.summary: The northern black korhaan (Afrotis afraoides), also known as the white-quilled bustard, is a species of bird in the bustard family, Otidid…

relations.subject: Northern black korhaan
relations.evidence: Its habitat is primarily open grassland and scrub
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Northern black korhaan
relations.evidence: The northern black korhaan is found in Namibia, Botswana, Lesotho and northern South Africa. Its habitat is grassland, with vegetation up to a metre high, grassy dunes, semi-arid scrubland and open veldt
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。
